query.surrealdb: SELECT * FROM record:42
SELECT * FROM record WHERE id = record:42
SELECT * FROM record WHERE number > 4625
SELECT * FROM record WHERE age IN [5, 15, 25, 35, 45, 55, 65]
SELECT * FROM record WHERE city = 'london' AND age > 50
SELECT * FROM record WHERE number > 4625 ORDER BY age LIMIT 50
SELECT * FROM record WHERE score < 7.5 ORDER BY number DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT * FROM record WHERE age > 85 AND active = true ORDER BY city, score DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT * OMIT words, embedding, tags FROM record LIMIT 100
SELECT name, city, age, number FROM record WHERE score > 50.0 LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM record ORDER BY number LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM record ORDER BY city, number DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT city, count() as total FROM record GROUP BY city
SELECT city, math::sum(number) as total FROM record GROUP BY city
SELECT city, math::mean(age) as avg_age FROM record GROUP BY city
SELECT city, math::sum(number) as s1, math::sum(number) as s2, math::mean(age) as avg_age FROM record GROUP BY city
SELECT count() as c, math::sum(number) as total, math::mean(age) as avg_age FROM record GROUP ALL
SELECT city, count() as total, math::mean(score) as avg_score FROM record GROUP BY city ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT city, count() as total, math::sum(number) as sum FROM record WHERE age > 50 GROUP BY city
SELECT city, math::sum(number) as total, math::sum(number) as dup1, math::sum(number) as dup2 FROM record GROUP BY city
SELECT city, math::sum(number) as total, math::sum(number) / count() as avg_manual, math::sum(number) * 2 as doubled FROM record GROUP BY city
SELECT * FROM record SPLIT tags LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM record LIMIT 100 FETCH friend
SELECT * FROM record WHERE city = 'london' LIMIT 50 FETCH friend
SELECT ->knows->record FROM record:1
SELECT ->knows->record->knows->record FROM record:1
SELECT ->knows->record->knows->record->knows->record FROM record:1
SELECT <-knows<-record FROM record:1
SELECT <->knows<->record FROM record:1
SELECT ->knows[WHERE weight > 50]->record FROM record:1
SELECT id, ->knows->record.name FROM record LIMIT 100
SELECT id, ->knows->(? WHERE number > 2500) FROM record LIMIT 50
SELECT id, count(->knows) as edge_count FROM record LIMIT 100
SELECT id, ->knows->record->knows->record FROM record LIMIT 20
SELECT name, ->knows->(SELECT * FROM record WHERE number > 2500) FROM record:1
SELECT ->knows->(SELECT COUNT() as c, math::mean(number) as avg_num FROM record GROUP ALL) FROM record:1
SELECT ->knows->(SELECT COUNT() as c, math::mean(number) as avg_num, city FROM record GROUP BY city) FROM record:1
SELECT *, (SELECT * FROM small_table) as sub FROM record LIMIT 100
SELECT *, (SELECT count() FROM small_table GROUP ALL) as sub_count FROM record LIMIT 100
SELECT city, math::mean(number) as avg FROM (SELECT * FROM record WHERE age > 50 LIMIT 10000) GROUP BY city
SELECT city, count() as c, math::mean(age) as avg_age FROM record WHERE number > 1000 GROUP BY city ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM record WHERE embedding <|5,EUCLIDEAN|> [0.5, 0.3, 0.7, 0.1]
